sections.title: Standard dialogue before The Dig Site

lines.speaker: Researcher
lines.text: Hello there. What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just looking around at the moment.

lines.speaker: Researcher
lines.text: Well, feel free to talk to me should you come across anything you can't figure out.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after The Dig Site

lines.speaker: Researcher
lines.text: Hello there! I heard all about your big find; well done!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about the tools an archaeologist uses?

lines.speaker: Researcher
lines.text: Of course! Let's see now... Rock picks are for splitting rocks or scraping away soil; you can get one from a cupboard in the Education Centre.

lines.speaker: Researcher
lines.text: I think you'll find them scattered about pretty much everywhere, but I know you can get one from a cupboard somewhere in the Education Centre, just like the rock pick!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, what about a specimen brush?

lines.speaker: Researcher
lines.text: We have a bit of a shortage of those at the moment. You could try borrowing one from a workman on the site... but I don't think they'd give it willingly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like I'll need to be sneaky to get one of those, then... Okay - trowel?

lines.speaker: Researcher
lines.text: Ahh... that you must earn by passing your exams! The examiner holds those.

lines.speaker: Researcher
lines.text: If you need something identified or are not sure about something, give it to Terry; he's the archaeological expert in the next room.
